summary_text: **Residual Risks (after those 3 patches)** - `source authenticity risk`: `social-context-reference.json` is still self-declared metadata. A forged URL/quote set can be attached without proving provenance. - `quote quality bypass`: even with `quotes >= 1`, meaningless or fabricated quotes can satisfy the gate; current checks are structural, not semantic. - `implementation gate mismatch`: `implement` phase checks section headers in implementation artifacts, not that content is grounded to the attached source. - `run targeting risk`: a valid `run_id` can still be wrong for operator intent (wrong run/purpose), and attachment will succeed if health checks pass. - `artifact drift`: absolute paths help, but referenced files can still be deleted/overwritten after attach; compact keeps stale pointers. - `concurrency/race`: parallel operators or scripts can overwrite `.fugue/pre-implement/issue-*.md` and compact state unexpectedly. - `injection/unsafe content`: source summaries/quotes can carry prompt-injection text into later analysis steps if consumed raw. - `policy bypass via flags`: research-only escape hatches (e.g. `--allow-missing-quotes`) can be overused operationally and become de facto default. **Must-have Mitigations** - Add a `source_verification_status` (`unverified|verified`) and block `implement` when `unverified`. - Enforce `research-only` as an explicit mode that never emits `implementation_report_path` and cannot complete `implement`. - Add provenance fields: `source_hash`, `captured_at`, `captured_by`, and require immutable hash recording at attach time. - Validate quote payloads with minimum quality rules (length, uniqueness, max count) and reject empty/duplicate boilerplate quotes. - Add run-intent guard: require `run purpose`/`project` match check before attach/update. - Add stale-pointer checks in `phase-check`: fail when `context_reference.path` or linked artifacts are missing/changed hash. - Add lock discipline around social bootstrap + compact update to avoid race overwrites. - Add regression tests for: wrong-run attach rejection, verified/unverified phase behavior, stale path failure, and research-only non-escalation.
